workouts.name: Reformer — Footwork Foundation (40 min)
workouts.content:
Total: 40 min · Pilates reformer

Setup: Springs 3–4 (medium-heavy) · Headrest up · Footbar up · Supine on carriage

Warm-Up (10 min):
• Breathing + Imprint — 8 breaths
• Pelvic Tilts / Bridge Prep — 8 reps

Footwork Series (15 min):
• Toes (Pilates V) — 10 reps
• Arches — 10 reps
• Heels — 10 reps
• Wide Parallel (hip width) — 10 reps
• Single Leg — 8 each side

Main Exercise (10 min):
• Running + Pelvic Lift — 20 steps + 8 lifts

Cool Down (5 min):
• Knee Folds / Supine Hip Flexor Stretch — 4 each side
• Spinal Rotation supine — 1 min each side

Notes: Postpartum-safe ✅ · Maintain neutral spine · Reduce spring if needed

workouts.name: 45 Min Full Body
workouts.content:
Warm-Up: 5 min easy row

Block 1 — Lower Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Barbell/goblet squat
• Romanian deadlift (dumbbells)
• Glute bridge
• Reverse lunge (alternating)

Block 2 — Upper Body (3 rounds, 45s on / 15s rest):
• Cable lat pulldown
• Dumbbell shoulder press
• Cable seated row
• Dumbbell bicep curl

Block 3 — Cardio (8 min):
• 8 x 1-min treadmill intervals (30s fast / 30s recover, incline 3-5%)

Cool Down: 5 min full body stretch
